# Multi Model Super Sayn

A Claude Code configuration layer that implements multi-model AI orchestration. Claude Code acts as the orchestrator, routing tasks to Gemini CLI and Codex CLI based on task type, context size, and cost efficiency.

## Purpose
Reduce AI development costs 60-80% on delegable tasks while maintaining Claude Sonnet quality for architecture and complex reasoning work.

## Key files
- CLAUDE.md — routing rules and decision matrix (loaded by Claude Code at session start)
- .mcp.json — Codex CLI exposed as MCP server
- .claude/agents/ — 5 subagent definitions:
  - gemini-analyst.md: whole-codebase analysis via Gemini 1M token context
  - gemini-researcher.md: deep research with Google Search grounding
  - codex-worker.md: focused implementation in 1-5 files
  - flash-triage.md: batch/repetitive tasks at minimum cost
  - multi-reviewer.md: parallel adversarial review using both Gemini and Codex

## How it works
Claude reads YAML frontmatter `description` fields in agent files to auto-route tasks. Routing rules in CLAUDE.md provide a decision matrix with numeric thresholds (file count, token count, task type).

## Cost model
- Gemini 2.5 Flash: ~10x cheaper than Claude Sonnet per token
- Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite: ~30x cheaper
- Codex CLI: ~2x cheaper
- Architecture/reasoning stays in Claude Sonnet

## Prerequisites
- Gemini CLI (OAuth, free tier): npm i -g @google/gemini-cli
- Codex CLI (ChatGPT OAuth): npm i -g @openai/codex
- Claude Code: claude.ai/code

## Language/format
Configuration files only (Markdown + JSON). No runtime code required. Drop-in for any Claude Code project.
